settingConfigSaveAndSyncSuccess: The configuration is saved and synced success
settingConfigSaveFail: The configuration is saved but synced error
confirmDelete: Are you sure to stop share this doc？

settingsWorkspace.title: Preferences
settingsWorkspace.immediateActionTip: Items take effect as soon as you add or remove them.
settingsWorkspace.syncFailed: Sync failed. Please try again later.

keyInfo.notValid: Registration Code Is Invalid Or Not Registered

bs.siyuanApiTip: SiYuan note server address, including port. For local single workspace, it can be fixed to: http://127.0.0.1:6806. For multiple workspaces or Docker external network, please auto retrieve.
bs.regCodeTip: to get a registration code, or send an email to youweics@163.com to apply for a trial
bs.newUITip: When enabled, left click opens the share window and right click opens settings and share management.

cs.customCssTip: Sync custom CSS snippets to the sharing page
cs.fixTitleTip: Remove numbers from titles like `001.Test title`, resulting in `Test title`
cs.domainTip: Supports built-in and custom domains, all domains are global CDN domains.
cs.docPathTip: Custom document path access, for example: https://siyuannote.site/x/[docId], where x can be d, s, p, a, doc, link, post, article, etc.
cs.docTreeTip: Enable document tree navigation to display the subdocument hierarchy structure on the shared page for easy browsing. Maximum depth is 6 levels; changes require re-sharing to take effect. For privacy protection, parent documents are not displayed.
cs.outlineTip: Whether to enable the document outline. If enabled, you can set the maximum depth to 6, meaning it will fetch up to h6. Enabling or disabling takes effect immediately, but changing the depth requires re-sharing.
cs.shareSubdocumentsTip: Enable subdocument sharing feature. When enabled, sharing a document will automatically include all its subdocuments, creating a complete document tree structure. Supports quantity limits (default 100, max 999) and depth control (default 3 levels).
cs.confirmCancelSubdocuments: You have already shared subdocuments. Disabling subdocument sharing will cancel the shared subdocuments. Do you want to continue?
cs.confirmAddSubdocuments: You have already shared this document. Enabling subdocument sharing will re-share to include all subdocuments. Do you want to continue?
cs.confirmCancelReferences: You have already shared reference documents. Disabling reference document sharing will cancel the shared reference documents. Do you want to continue?
cs.confirmAddReferences: You have already shared this document. Enabling reference document sharing will re-share to include all reference documents. Do you want to continue?
cs.shareReferencesTip: Enable reference document sharing feature. When enabled, sharing a document will automatically include all other documents referenced by this document.
cs.aiAssistantTip: AI assistant toggle, enabled by default. When enabled, it will be displayed on the right side of the document details page.
cs.postMetaTip: Enabled by default. When turned on, the info bar is shown below the document title.
cs.maxSubdocumentsTip: Set the maximum number of subdocuments to share. -1 means unlimited, 100 is the default, and 999 is the maximum. Note: Unlimited may cause performance issues.
cs.passwordEnabledTip: Whether to enable password protection. When enabled, a random share password will be generated by default (can be modified)
cs.showPasswordTip: Click to temporarily view your password (hidden by default for security)

shareService.msgBatchComplete: Share complete: [param1] documents, skipped [param2] unchanged documents
shareService.msgProcessPic: Text has been shared, detected document image, starting image processing...
shareService.msgStartGroup: Starting to process images of group [param1].  Total [param2] groups, each group contains [param3] images.
shareService.msgStartCurrentPic: Starting to process image of index [param1]: [param2], please wait...
shareService.msgGroupProcessSuccess: Group [param1] of images processed successfully. Total [param2] groups, each group contains [param3] images.
shareService.msgMediaUploadError: An exception occurred while uploading media =>
shareService.msgProcessPicBatch: Preparing to upload group [param1] of images, please wait...
shareService.success: Congratulations, all images have been processed successfully
shareService.successPic: All images have been processed, total ([param1]), succeed ([param2]), failed ([param3])
shareService.errorPic: [param1] images failed to process, please check the logs
shareService.updateOptionsException: Exception occurred while updating share options:
shareService.msgStartDataViewGroup: Starting to process database media group [param1]. Total [param2] groups, each group contains [param3] items.
shareService.msgStartCurrentDataViewMedia: Starting to process database media index [param1]: [param2], please wait...
shareService.msgDataViewGroupProcessSuccess: Database media group [param1] processed successfully. Total [param2] groups, each group contains [param3] items.
shareService.msgDataViewMediaUploadError: An exception occurred while uploading database media =>
shareService.msgProcessDataViewMediaBatch: Preparing to upload database media group [param1], please wait...
shareService.msgCurrentDataViewMediaSuccess: Group [param1] has successfully uploaded database media
shareService.successDataViewMedia: Congratulations, all database media have been processed successfully
shareService.successDataViewMediaCount: All database media have been processed, total ([param1]), succeed ([param2]), failed ([param3])
shareService.errorDataViewMedia: [param1] database media failed to process, please check the logs

topbar.shareSuccessError: Share service exception, please contact youweics@163.com:
topbar.msgIngError: Images are not fully processed or have failed, it is recommended to wait or reshare
topbar.msgNoShare: Document has not been shared, cannot view=>

manage.setHomeConfirm: Note: Setting the home page only takes effect for custom domains added to the whitelist. Are you sure you want to set the home page to「[param1]」?

shareUI.errorBannerText: Share errors detected, click to view details

ui.msgIngError: The image has not been processed or the process failed, it is recommended to wait or reshare
ui.shareSuccessError: There is an exception in the sharing service, please contact youweics@163.com
ui.fullUpdateTip: Force reshare all content, use after doc tree settings changed
ui.passwordTip: After setting an access password, visitors need to enter the password to view the document
ui.expiresPlaceholder: Enter expiration time in seconds (0 for permanent)
ui.expiresTip: Set the expiration time for the share link (in seconds). 0 means permanent.
ui.expiresError: Invalid expiration time. Please enter a number between 0 and 604800 (7 days).
ui.incrementalShareModeInfo: Incremental share mode does not require a stable ID, please use the incremental share entry
ui.performanceWarning: Large number of subdocuments may impact performance

incrementalShare.title: Incremental Share
incrementalShare.enabledTip: Automatically detect document changes and provide bulk sharing functionality
incrementalShare.resetLastShareTimeTip: After reset, all documents will be rechecked for changes
incrementalShare.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset the share time? This will recheck all documents for changes.

blacklist.title: Blacklist Management
blacklist.targetIdPlaceholder: Enter document ID or notebook ID
blacklist.targetNamePlaceholder: Enter keywords to search documents or notebooks
blacklist.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this blacklist item?
blacklist.manageTip: Manage notebooks or documents that should not be shared

progressManager.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel the current operation?
progressManager.waitingForResourceCompletion: Waiting for resource processing to complete...
progressManager.errorAcknowledged: Error recorded, you can view details anytime

seo.saveSuccess: SEO settings saved and synced successfully
seo.siteTitlePlaceholder: Enter main website title (recommended within 30 characters)
seo.siteDescriptionPlaceholder: Enter website description (150-160 characters recommended, affects SEO)
seo.customHeaderTip: Custom CSS/JS code that will be inserted before closing </head>
seo.customFooterTip: Analytics code etc. that will be inserted before closing </body>
seo.shareTemplateTip: HTML template with variables like {{title}}, {{url}} for sharing content
seo.shareTemplatePlaceholder: Enter share template (supports HTML and variables like {{title}}, {{url}})...
